app.title: I spent 6 years building my Kanban as I hated how managers run the boards
app.author: okovooo
app.description: A custom Kanban board builder with a unique approach.
proposed_tests: Install the CLI tool, create a new board, and add a single column
Run the tool with a large number of boards and verify its performance
Verify that the tool supports importing from existing Kanban tools
